/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/p2p-kvstore.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2p-kvstore.dir/src/KVStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2p-kvstore.dir/src/Crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2p-kvstore.dir/src/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2p-kvstore.dir/src/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2p-kvstore.dir/src/ConnectionHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/p2p-kvstore.dir/src/Node.cpp.o  -o p2p-kvstore  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread
